terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using Suqafuran. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these conditions.
terms.introText: Welcome to Suqafuran. These Terms & Conditions govern your access to and use of the suqafuran.com website, mobile applications, and services. If you do not agree to all the terms and conditions outlined below, you may not access or use the platform.
accountRegistrationContent: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account and post listings on Suqafuran.
You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during the registration process.
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and for all activities that occur under your account.
Suqafuran reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that provide false information or violate these terms.
listingRulesContent: All listings must accurately describe the item or service being offered.
Items listed must be legally available for sale in the location where they are posted.
Prohibited items include illegal drugs, weapons, counterfeit goods, and stolen property.
Listings must not contain misleading information, spam, or offensive language.
Suqafuran reserves the right to remove any listing that violates our community standards without prior notice.
buyerSellerContent: Suqafuran acts as a venue to connect buyers and sellers and is not a party to the actual transaction.
Buyers are responsible for inspecting items before making any payment.
Sellers are responsible for accurately describing the condition and legality of the items they sell.
Users should exercise caution when conducting transactions with unknown parties.
We strongly recommend meeting in safe, public places when completing transactions.
feesContent: Basic listings on Suqafuran are currently free, but we may charge for premium services or promotions.
Payment for boosted listings or advertisements is non-refundable once the service has started.
Users are responsible for any taxes or local fees associated with their sales.
Pricing for premium services is subject to change with prior notice on our platform.
intellectualPropertyContent: The Suqafuran logo, branding, and platform content are protected by copyright and trademark laws.
By posting content on Suqafuran, you grant us a non-exclusive license to display and promote that content.
You may not use our branding or scrape our platform data without express written permission.
liabilityContent: Suqafuran is provided 'as is' without any warranties, express or implied.
We are not liable for any losses, damages, or disputes arising from user transactions.
We do not guarantee the accuracy of user-posted content or the availability of the platform at all times.
Our total liability for any claim related to our services is limited to the amount paid by you for those services.
terms.changesDesc: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Terms & Conditions on this page. You are advised to review these terms periodically for any changes.
terms.questionsDesc: If you have any questions or require clarification about these terms, please contact our support team.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how Suqafuran collects, uses, and safeguards your information.
privacy.introText: By using Suqafuran — including our website at suqafuran.com and our mobile apps — you agree to the collection and use of information described in this policy. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
dataCollectionContent: Account information: name, email address, phone number, and profile photo when you register.
Listing data: titles, descriptions, prices, images, and location you provide when posting ads.
Usage data: pages visited, search queries, clicks, and time spent on the platform.
Device information: IP address, browser type, operating system, and device identifiers.
Communications: messages exchanged between buyers and sellers through our platform.
howWeUseContent: To create and manage your account, authenticate logins, and keep your account secure.
To display your listings to potential buyers across Somalia and Africa.
To send you important notifications about your ads, messages, and account activity.
To improve our platform, fix bugs, and develop new features based on usage patterns.
To detect and prevent fraud, spam, and misuse of the Suqafuran marketplace.
To comply with applicable laws and regulations in Somalia and the jurisdictions we operate in.
sharingContent: Your public listing details (title, price, location, images) are visible to all users.
Your display name and general location are shown on your seller profile.
We do not sell your personal data to third parties for marketing purposes.
We may share data with trusted service providers (hosting, payments, analytics) under strict confidentiality agreements.
We may disclose information when required by law, court order, or to protect the safety of our users.
securityContent: All data is transmitted over HTTPS with TLS encryption.
Passwords are hashed using industry-standard algorithms and never stored in plain text.
Access to production databases is restricted to authorised personnel only.
We conduct regular security audits and vulnerability assessments.
In the event of a data breach, we will notify affected users within 72 hours.
yourRightsContent: Access: You may request a copy of the personal data we hold about you at any time.
Correction: You can update your profile information directly from your account settings.
Deletion: You may request deletion of your account and associated data by contacting us.
Opt-out: You can unsubscribe from marketing emails using the link in any email we send.
Data portability: You may request your data in a machine-readable format.
cookiesContent: We use cookies — small text files stored on your device — to make Suqafuran work and improve your experience.
Essential cookies: required for login sessions, security tokens, and core platform functionality. These cannot be turned off.
Preference cookies: remember your language choice (English or Somali) and display settings.
Analytics cookies: help us understand how users navigate the platform using aggregated, anonymised data.
When you first visit Suqafuran, a cookie notice will appear. Clicking "Accept" records your consent in your browser.
You can disable non-essential cookies in your browser or device settings at any time.
privacy.childrenDesc: Suqafuran is not intended for children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us and we will promptly delete it.
privacy.changesDesc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes by posting a notice on our platform or sending you an email. Continued use of Suqafuran after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the revised policy.
privacy.questionsDesc: If you have any questions, requests, or concerns about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your personal data, please reach out to us.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Find answers to your questions
help.noResultsDesc: We couldn't find any help articles matching
help.heroSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about buying, selling, and staying safe on Suqafuran.
help.faqBuy1Q: How do I buy an item on Suqafuran?
help.faqBuy1A: Buying is simple! Browse or search for items, click on a listing you like, and use the "Chat" or "Reveal Phone" buttons to contact the seller directly. Always meet in person in a safe, public place to inspect the item before paying.
help.faqBuy2A: Many sellers are open to offers. You can discuss the price with the seller through our in-app chat or by calling them. Look for the "Negotiable" tag on listings.
help.faqSell1Q: How do I post an ad?
help.faqSell1A: Click the "Post New Ad" button in your dashboard or the "Sell Now" button in the header. Choose a category, upload clear photos, add a descriptive title and price, then click "Post Listing". It's free!
help.faqSell2Q: How can I sell my items faster?
help.faqSell2A: To sell faster: 1. Use high-quality photos. 2. Write a detailed description. 3. Set a fair, competitive price. 4. Become a "Verified Seller" to build more trust with buyers.
help.faqSafety1Q: How do I stay safe while trading?
help.faqSafety1A: Safety is our priority. Always meet in public places (like malls or cafes), never send money before seeing the item, and trust your instincts. If a deal seems too good to be true, it probably is.
help.faqSafety2Q: What is the Verified Seller program?
help.faqSafety2A: Our Verified Seller program badges sellers who have provided official ID documentation. This helps buyers identify trustworthy partners. You can apply for verification in your account settings.
help.faqAccount1Q: How do I change my password?
help.faqAccount1A: Go to "Account Settings" from your dashboard sidebar. In the "Security" tab, you can update your password and manage your active sessions.
help.faqAccount2Q: I forgot my password, what should I do?
help.faqAccount2A: On the login page, click "Forgot Password?". Enter your email address, and we'll send you a secure link to reset it.

delivery.title: Suqafuran Delivery
delivery.subtitle: Track your orders and shipping status in real-time.
delivery.noDeliveriesDesc: Items you buy or sell with Suqafuran Delivery will appear here.

about.missionDesc: Our mission is to create a safe, transparent, and seamless marketplace for millions of people across the continent.
about.trustDesc: Trust is at the core of everything we do. We build the best verification tools for our community.
about.velocityDesc: Sell your items in no time. Our platform is built for speed and efficiency.
about.communityDesc: We support local businesses to grow and reach more customers every day.
about.teamDesc: Our team is dedicated to solving unique trade challenges across the African continent.
about.storyPara1: We started with a simple observation: buying and selling in East Africa was too risky, too slow, and too disconnected.
about.storyPara2: So we built Suqafuran — a platform with trust at its core, AI-powered tools to simplify listings, and a community focused on real, face-to-face commerce.

safety.title: Your Safety is Our Priority
safety.subtitle: Follow these simple guidelines to ensure a safe trading experience on Suqafuran.
safety.meetInPublicDesc: Always meet the seller or buyer in a well-lit, busy public place like a mall or police station.
safety.inspectItemDesc: Never pay before you see and test the item yourself. Check for functionality and condition.
safety.payOnDeliveryDesc: Do not send money in advance via M-Pesa or bank transfer. Pay only after receiving the item.
safety.useSecureChatDesc: Keep all communications within the Suqafuran chat to have a record of your conversation.
safety.reportScamTitle: Spot a Scam? Report it Immediately!
safety.reportScamDesc: Our moderation team works 24/7 to remove suspicious listings. If an ad looks too good to be true, it probably is. Help us keep Suqafuran safe by reporting any suspicious behavior.
safety.scam1: Unrealistically low prices for high-end items.
safety.scam2: Sellers who refuse to meet in person.
safety.scam3: Requests for advanced payment or shipping fees.
safety.scam4: Sellers who ask for personal information like passwords or OTPs.
